top_signals.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
top_signals.summary: Brent oil extended its recent rally as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian Refiners Halt Iraq Oil Loadings as Hormuz Risks Escalate
top_signals.summary: Two Indian state-run refiners have suspended crude oil loadings from Iraq as mounting security risks in the Strait of Hormuz make it increasingly difficult to ensure safety of vessels, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Jito rolls out JTX self-custodial trading platform for Solana tokens and RWAs
top_signals.summary: Jito Labs launched JTX, a self-custodial Solana trading platform with spot trading for tokens and tokenized RWAs.
